justifications.temporal_understanding: The agent correctly understood "next Tuesday" as June 9th and then correctly interpreted "earlier than Wednesday, June 10th" to find available slots.
justifications.negotiation_effectiveness: The agent effectively proposed alternative dates and times when the initial request was unavailable, offering a good range of options.
justifications.conversational_efficiency: The agent efficiently handled the conversation, gathering all necessary information and booking the appointment without unnecessary turns or redundant questions.
justifications.customer_experience: The interaction was smooth and professional, with the agent providing clear information and successfully booking the appointment.
justifications.recovery_quality: The agent gracefully recovered from the initial unavailability by offering relevant earlier slots without losing context.
